twitter_thread: 4 AI models, 96% identical results. Claude's among them. What's the point of differentiation?
GPT-5.6, Grok 4.5, and Muse Spark replicate Claude's results with 2-5% variance. Is this a ceiling for innovation?
Nanako0129's pilotfish uses Claude Code to save 75% on execution costs with a 3-layer orchestration model.
Pilotfish's verification guard catches 90% of errors before execution. A 12-line code fix with huge payoff.
Cheaper models can execute tasks at 70% less cost, but add 30% to development time. Is it worth it?
Selecting the right models for each task requires 50% more planning, but cuts errors by 40%. What's your model selection process?
Have you used multi-model orchestration with Claude or other AI models? What were your cost savings? #claudeai #aimodels
